decisions.decision: Multi-page structure was already complete from prior GSD phases — no re-splitting needed
Cart via localStorage + Alpine.store (guest-only, no Supabase for now)
decisions.rationale: Assessment scope; simpler; works without auth

decisions.decision: AI proxy via netlify/functions/ai-advisor.js ESM export default pattern
decisions.rationale: Security: keeps API key server-side; follows CLAUDE.md spec (haiku-4-5)

decisions.decision: elvora_updated-3.html is superseded — real app is the separate HTML files
decisions.rationale: File was prior prototype; new architecture is the canonical source

next_action: Verify js/__env.js has real Supabase credentials. If yes, run schema+seed. Then add cart.js script to all HTML pages and update contact.html form to use Supabase insert.
context_notes: User asked to split elvora_updated-3.html monolith and add Supabase backend. Discovered project had existing multi-page structure from prior GSD phase 03. Session filled in the gaps: AI proxy, cart, netlify config, contacts table. The remaining blockers are all credential/deployment steps the user must do manually.
